description_long: This apartment building features a rectangular, boxy structure with a flat, dark gray roof and a light-colored facade. The front side showcases a prominent bay window section spanning multiple floors, flanked by symmetrical window arrangements and a central staircase leading to the main entrance. The rear of the building opens onto a large terrace or patio area, with extensive floor-to-ceiling windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The sides of the building are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and structural simplicity. The materials appear to be a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, typical of modern urban residential architecture. The overall design is clean and functional, with subtle color contrasts and geometric lines.
description: A modern, rectangular apartment building with a flat roof, bay windows at the front, and a large rear terrace with floor-to-ceiling glass. The facade features light colors and a central staircase entrance.
description_view_0: Front view with a central staircase, bay windows, and the main entrance visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing a mostly solid wall with minimal window openings and the terrace extending from the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the large terrace/patio area and extensive floor-to-ceiling windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid wall and the terrace visible on the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, with a prominent bay window section and grouped floor-to-ceiling windows at the rear. Side windows are minimal and spaced far apart.
